title: Physical Access vs OT Network First-Seen Asset

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Nozomi Networks TA (6905), HEC from PACS
spl:
index=pacs sourcetype="pacs:door" door_id IN ("OT-MCC-A","OT-SERVER-1") earliest=-24h
| eval t_phys=_time, who=badge_id
| join max=0 type=inner who [
  search index=ot_net sourcetype="nozomi:assets" earliest=-24h
  | where first_seen_time>_time-86400
  | eval who=owner
  | stats min(first_seen_time) as fs by asset_name, vlan, who
]
| eval delta_sec=fs-t_phys
| where delta_sec>120 OR isnull(who)
| table _time, door_id, badge_id, asset_name, vlan, delta_sec
value: Relates physical access events to new or unknown OT assets appearing on protected VLANs to strengthen environmental controls narrative.
implementation: (1) Sync clocks between PACS and NMS; (2) enrich asset owner field; (3) filter tailgating test doors; (4) integrate physical security escalation path.
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
